stem: A scatterplot in the xy-plane has 12 data points trending up from left to right, with a line of best fit passing through the approximate coordinates (300, 3), (600, 6), and (1,200, 12). At x = 900, which of the following is closest to the y-value predicted by the line of best fit?
rationale:
Choice A is correct. Slope = (6 − 3)/(600 − 300) = 0.01. At x = 900, y = 3 + 0.01·(900 − 300) = 3 + 6 = 9.

Choices B, C, and D correspond to other x-values.
